2605.29753.title: A unified deeplearning framework for contrast-phase-specific virtual monochromatic imaging
2605.29753.paper_summary: Dual-energy CT (DECT) enables virtual monochromatic imaging (VMI) and improved contrast resolution, but its clinical adoption is limited by hardware complexity and cost. In this work, we propose a unified deep learning framework that synthesizes contrast-phase-specific virtual monochromatic 50 keV images from single-energy CT (SECT) data by leveraging contrast phase information as a prior. The model is trained using DECT-derived 70 keV and 50 keV image pairs across four contrast phases -- Angio, Arterial, Portal, and Delayed -- using a novel prior conditioning architecture that integrates contrast phase priors into the energy transformation process. We demonstrate that the proposed unified model achieves contrast enhancement and generalizes well across contrast phases. Additionally, we show that the model can generate 50 keV-like images from SECT inputs, preserving contrast phase-specific dynamics.
2605.29753.paper_summary_zh: 雙能量 CT (DECT) 使得虛擬單色成像 (VMI) 和改善對比度解析度成為可能，但其臨床應用受到硬體複雜性和成本的限制。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們提出了一個統一的深度學習框架，通過利用對比度相位信息作為先驗，從單能量 CT (SECT) 數據合成對比相位特定的虛擬單色 50 keV 圖像。<lb/>該模型使用來自 DECT 的 70 keV 和 50 keV 圖像對進行訓練，涵蓋四個對比相位 -- 血管相位、動脈相位、門脈相位和延遲相位 -- 使用一種新穎的先驗條件架構，將對比相位先驗整合到能量轉換過程中。<lb/>我們證明了所提出的統一模型實現了對比度增強，並在對比相位之間良好泛化。<lb/>此外，我們顯示該模型可以從 SECT 輸入生成類似 50 keV 的圖像，保持對比相位特定的動態。
2605.29753.author: Antony Jerald et.al.
2605.29753.authors: Antony Jerald, Hemant K Aggarwal, Brian Nett, Avinash Gopal, Phaneendra K Yalavarthy, Bipul Das, Rajesh Langoju
